name: Charlie “Char” Driscoll || First Kiss
description:
“i’m gonna be so honest, im not listenin’ to a single word y’er sayin’. all i can focus on is your lips and how fuckin’ good they’d taste...”

_________________________

Charlie’s life has been one mess after another, days spent smoking weed and wanting to bang his head against the wall. however, Charlie has had one solace, one true escape from his shitty life; you, her best friend.

something... weird has been happening, lately. there’s always been a certain closeness between you and Charlie. she’s always been cuddly and physically affectionate with you but recently her touch has lingered. fingertips teasing the waistband of your pants, palms wandering over your chest, nose dragging up your neck, hands squeezing your hips. it’s almost... intimate, but not as intimate as the way her eyes linger on your lips.

_________________________

like viktor from arcane, i’ve come back to life a second time. sorry for the lack of bots, my cat gave birth to five kittens! the last several weeks have been spent taking care of the (now) six cats that live in my house (despite my cat allergy, which is so worth it i love each of my babies so much). luckily things have calmed down for the most part. happy to say all six cats are happy and healthy for anyone wondering.

anyways, i recently found out the Charlie bot on my maxinthesummer account reached ONE MILLION CHATS! i’ve also realized i am at THREE HUNDRED followers here and SEVEN HUNDRED on my backup account. to celebrate, i'm releasing bots for

  • comforting Charlie

  • first kiss with Charlie

  • first time with Charlie

  • being fwb with Charlie

  • surprise 🤭 (not posted yet)

  • surprise 🤭 (not posted yet)

  • surprise 🤭 (not posted yet)

this bot is the recreation of my original Charlie bot, hopefully i’ve improved since my very first bot. :)

as always, all my bots have a wlw and mlm version, but i do not do mlw or wlm. i highly recommend you can read the scenario and personality to fully understand the story and motivations.
